summary: Closed SIM-003 after PR #18 merged into main. The reviewed GameCommand v1, Query v1, DomainEvent/StateDelta boundary, and shared Node/Worker command-query canary implementation is integrated at main merge commit 1c22cd872ef93e53e804d36d9610e178d73c6d62, and the dependency-ready follow-up task on this branch is SIM-006.

tests_run.result: PR #18 MERGED at 2026-06-24T08:31:40Z with merge commit 1c22cd872ef93e53e804d36d9610e178d73c6d62; Quality/Web and Windows Desktop Smoke checks both succeeded.
SIM-003 merge commit is an ancestor of origin/main.
SIM-003 was ACCEPTED on main before closure; after this closure branch it is CLOSED.

decisions: Close SIM-003 only after confirming the accepted implementation entered main through PR #18.
Do not start SIM-006 in this closure commit.
risks: Root pnpm format:check still omits packages/sim-core and packages/protocol globs; SIM-003 itself used targeted touched-file Prettier checks.
requested_action: After this closure commit is integrated, continue M1 autonomous execution by selecting the dependency-ready next task.
